title: Bridge Atlas - Episode 1: Intro | Tim Beiko & Timber Stinson-Schroff
description:
Time for bridge building at an unprecedented scale. Welcome to Bridge Atlas – a short series of salons featuring a mix of guests from the fields of artificial intelligence, music, climate, planetary governance, architecture, law, history, and the Ethereum ecosystem. Each episode features great conversation facilitated by guest host Christine Kim, former journalist. Join Christine on her journey to become protocol literate – and enjoy the show. 

This first episode will get you oriented, with Tim Beiko, Protocol Coordinator at the Ethereum Foundation and executive sponsor of Summer of Protocols (SoP), and Timber Stinson-Schroff, program manager for SoP.

Sign up for Bridge Atlas Day at Devconnect: https://devconnect.org/calendar?event=bridge-atlas
--------------------------------------------------------------
References from Episode 1:
- Pilot Study (https://summerofprotocols.com/research/module-two/the-unreasonable-sufficiency-of-protocols)
- Argument Engineering for Dummies (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KcICTT2GJY0)
- Protocol Reader (https://summerofprotocols.com/protocol-reader)
